message:
feat(handoff): implement First-Class Session Handoff Protocol (flywheel_gateway-2pl)

Implements a comprehensive agent-to-agent work transfer protocol with:

## State Machine
- Full phase transitions: initiate -> pending -> transfer -> complete
- Error states: rejected, failed, cancelled
- Audit trail for all state changes

## Services
- handoff.service.ts: Core orchestration with state machine
- handoff-context.service.ts: Context packaging and validation
- handoff-transfer.service.ts: Resource transfer logic

## Types (packages/shared/src/types/handoff.types.ts)
- HandoffRequest, HandoffContext, HandoffAcknowledgment
- ResourceManifest for tracking transferable resources
- Complete state machine type definitions

## REST API (routes/handoffs.ts)
- POST /handoffs - Initiate handoff
- GET /handoffs/:id - Get handoff details
- POST /handoffs/:id/accept - Accept handoff
- POST /handoffs/:id/reject - Reject handoff
- POST /handoffs/:id/cancel - Cancel handoff
- GET /handoffs/source/:agentId - List by source
- GET /handoffs/target/:agentId - List by target
- GET /handoffs/broadcast/:projectId - List broadcasts
- GET /handoffs/stats - Statistics

## WebSocket
- Added workspace:handoffs channel type

## Tests: 44 passing
- Handoff service tests (state machine, acceptance, rejection)
- Context service tests (building, validation, serialization)

This unblocks flywheel_gateway-f8f (Phase 3 Epic).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
